mano_cua.result_summary: Fixed Board添加列后图块顺序错乱：添加第6列时，原第5行的图块(运输/21,场所/22,位置/23,玩具/24)被分配到各行的第6列位置，而非整体按顺序重排。例如第1行第6列显示运输(#21)而非饮料(#6)。添加第7列时问题加剧。删除列后顺序可恢复。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Now back to 5 columns. The right side control shows 5. Tile arrangement verified: Row 1: 是(1),没有(2),快速聊天(3),时间(4),食物(5) ✓; Row 2: 饮料(6),零食(7),活动(8),情绪(9),身体(10) ✓; Row 3: 服装(11),人(12),描述(13),厨房(14),学校(15) ✓; Row 4: 动物(16),技术(17),天气(18),植物(19),体育(20) ✓. Tiles in correct sequential order after removing columns. CONFIRMED BUG: Fixed Board adding columns does NOT correctly maintain sequential grid ordering. Tiles from overflow rows get appended to existing rows rather than the entire grid being reflowed in proper order.
